---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something outl should do
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

The user-facing pain that needs solving.
*Not* the proposed implementation yet — start with the problem.

## Why this matters

Who runs into it, how often, what the workaround is today (if any).

## Proposed solution (optional)

If you have one in mind.
Keep it concrete: which command / keystroke / config option.

## Alternatives you considered

What else you thought about and why this option seems best.

## Out of scope

What this issue is *not* trying to fix.
Helps reviewers not let scope creep.

## Anything else

Links to discussions, related issues, sketches.
